title: More Properties (Window Properties)
text: More Properties (Window Properties) Define additional window properties for the form you are defining. The parameters displayed (if any) are initially supplied by Uniface as default parameters for the form. The initialization file for your system can affect these settings (such as .ini and .Xdefaults ). Fields Parameter Name Parameter Value How to Click New to add a property or Delete to delete a property. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
